Week 8 is live: Week 8 Pre-Draw Edition

Pre-draw edition for 18-24 May 2026 . Week 8 keeps the ATP clay swing in focus, but this is the kind of slate where fantasy edges still come from patience before the bracket is official. The early objective is to identify likely premium anchors, track fatigue after multiple clay weeks, and flag ranking-based pricing gaps that could matter once the official draw lands and the slate sharpens.

Bonus Ball board: Jannik Sinner, Carlos Alcaraz, Alexander Zverev.
Read the full cheat sheet: https://tennis-automated-fantasy.netlify.app/pages/2026-week-8-pre-draw.html
